title: Status indicators must combine color with text or icon
summary: AI-generated interfaces use colored status dots without text labels, excluding colorblind users and failing WCAG 1.4.1.
instruction: Every status indicator must combine color with a text label, icon, or pattern. Do not use color as the sole differentiator for status, state, or category.
rationale: Approximately 8% of users have color vision deficiency. Color-only indicators also fail when viewed on grayscale screens, in high-contrast mode, or when printed. The fix is simple: add a text label, icon, or positional cue alongside the color.

violations: A deployment dashboard showing status as red/green/yellow dots without text labels.
A user table with a Status column showing only green or red circles.
controls: A deployment dashboard with colored dots AND text labels ('Active', 'Error', 'Pending') AND icon indicators.
A user table with colored badges that include text and subtle icons.
borderline: Real-time status indicators on hardware devices (cameras, sensors) where space is extremely limited - should have tooltip text.

exceptions.description: Gaming platform status indicators where color convention is widely established with position as secondary coding. Physical-device UI emulators with extreme space constraints.

detector.signalDescription: Find small colored elements (under 24px, circular) positioned as status indicators. Check for adjacent text or aria-label within the same container.
limitations: Decorative colored elements may be mistaken for status indicators.
Some properly implemented color+pattern combinations need pattern detection beyond basic CSS analysis.

scenarios: Brand decorative accent elements that are not status indicators.
Step indicators where numbered steps provide non-color differentiation.
mitigations: Limit to elements within badge/indicator/status contexts. Exclude decorative elements and step indicators.

fixturePlan.description: A user management page with Status column showing only colored circles: red, green, yellow.
Same page with colored circles AND text labels.
A server rack dashboard with colored dots without labels but with a position legend.
